title: Your Agent Is Wasting Tokens and You Don't Know It - Erik Hanchett, AWS
summary: Erik Hanchett discusses three optimization techniques for reducing agent token waste in production: prompt caching, model routing, and improved tool loop efficiency. These lightweight changes cut costs without sacrificing quality or requiring prompt rewrites.
writeup: In this AI Engineer talk, Erik Hanchett of AWS covers three techniques for cutting wasted tokens in production agents: prompt caching, model routing, and tighter tool loop efficiency. The framing matters because token waste raises costs in deployed systems, and these changes are presented as lightweight rather than full rewrites. The takeaway is that the three methods reduce cost without sacrificing quality or requiring prompts to be rewritten.
